content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only that file.

agent2: We're in separate environments (my git status is clean, no fallback_searchpath present), so no real file clobbering - each of us submits our own patch.txt. I will add path_transform to FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source too (plus DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Since both add params to FileSystemLoader.__init__, just keep your new param after existing ones (as I will) so a merge is a simple param-list union - should be low risk. No action needed from you.

agent2: done. path_transform param added to FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py. All 841 existing tests pass. patch.txt written.
